project.name: descriptor-rework
project.description: Replace Kern's policy-gated wallet model with a BIP44/49/84/86 singlesig whitelist + auto-loaded descriptor registry, routing every PSBT sign/verify through a match->bind->regenerate->verify algorithm.

global_context.plan_summary: 78-phase rework turning wallet.c from a policy-gated singlesig/multisig singleton into a thin shell over a singlesig-whitelist module (main/core/ss_whitelist) and a descriptor-registry module (main/core/registry). PSBT signing/classification is rewritten (psbt_classify_input/output + claim_regenerate). UI pages (Addresses, Address Checker, Wallet Settings) gain a source picker and lose the policy dropdown. Authoritative spec: .cm/spec/PLAN.md + SNIP.md + ROADMAP.md.
